items.title: Page updated: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Homepage Announcements

page_lines: The Department of Labor’s State Average Weekly Wage (SAWW) is the basis for calculating maximum benefits, annual adjustments and impairment awards. The SAWW as of July 1, 2026, is $1,249.12. The multiplier for annual/cost of living adjustments as of July 1, 2026 is 1.04194054. The following document contains the information necessary to calculate annual/
pursuant to Title 39-A § 212(4) and/or determine the
State Average Weekly Wage Notice 7/1/26 (PDF File)
The Outpatient Facility / Appendix IV fee schedule has been corrected to reflect the
outpatient rules and data in CMS-1834-FC:
. Questions or concerns regarding the annual update may be addressed to

Receive up-to-date information about Maine Workers' Compensation Board Rulemaking, Board meetings, and more by joining the WCB ListServe e-mail notification system.
To subscribe to WCB ListServe, send an e-mail to:
with "subscribe" in the body of the message. No subject is necessary.
